name: Whoppers Ice Cream Torte
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups crushed Whoppers Malted Milk Candy
3/4 cup crushed Whoppers Malted Milk Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Crust: Mix the crushed Whoppers, sugar, and melted butter until combined. Press into the bottom of a springform pan.
2. Chill in freezer while preparing the filling.
3. Filling: Soften the strawberry ice cream until it can be spread over the crust.
4. Freeze. Add the vanilla and chocolate layers, freezing after each addition.
5. Sprinkle coarsely crushed Whoppers on the top layer and freeze.
6. Unmold and slice when ready to serve.
Serves 9-10.
